holdings.infoBox: FJP is an equity ETF with a total of 102 individual holdings. The top holdings are Mitsui Kinzoku Company stock at 3.84%, NGK Corporation at 2.81%, Ibiden at 2.80%, Resonac Holdings at 2.35%, and Sumitomo Electric Industries at 2.17%.

overview.description: The First Trust Japan AlphaDEX Fund (FJP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ AlphaDEX Japan index. The fund tracks a tiered equal-weighted index of Japanese equities selected using both growth and value screens. FJP was launched on Apr 18, 2011 and is issued by First Trust.
